content:
diff --git a/packages/ui/src/engine/pixel-characters.ts b/packages/ui/src/engine/pixel-characters.ts
index 8e7f2a2..c1b3f5d 100644
--- a/packages/ui/src/engine/pixel-characters.ts
+++ b/packages/ui/src/engine/pixel-characters.ts
@@ -1,14 +1,41 @@
-// ─── Color Palette (medieval shading ramps) ────────────────────────
-const P = {
-  stone: ['#1e1e2a', '#2d2d3d', '#3f3f52', '#555568', '#6e6e82'],
-  wood: ['#1a0e06', '#2e1a0a', '#3e2a18', '#5c3317', '#7a5030'],
-  gold: ['#806020', '#b08830', '#d4a840', '#f0c040', '#fff080'],
-  crimson: ['#3a0a0a', '#6b1010', '#8b2020', '#c03030', '#e04040'],
-  royal: ['#0a0a3a', '#1a1a5a', '#2a2a8a', '#3a50b0', '#5080d0'],
-  forest: ['#0a1a0a', '#102a10', '#1a4a1a', '#2a7a2a', '#40b040'],
-  skin: ['#8a6040', '#b08060', '#d0a080', '#e8c0a0', '#f0d4b8'],
-  dark: ['#0a0a0e', '#14141e', '#1e1e2e', '#282838', '#323248'],
-};
+// ─── Centralized Color Palette System ─────────────────────────────
+const CASTLE_PALETTE = {
+  stone: {
+    base: '#1e1e2a',
+    shades: ['#2d2d3d', '#3f3f52', '#555568', '#6e6e82'],
+  },
+  wood: {
+    base: '#1a0e06',
+    shades: ['#2e1a0a', '#3e2a18', '#5c3317', '#7a5030'],
+  },
+  metal: {
+    base: '#7f8c8d',
+    shades: ['#5a6570', '#3e4a56', '#2a323a', '#1a1e22'],
+  },
+  fabric: {
+    crimson: ['#3a0a0a', '#6b1010', '#8b2020', '#c03030', '#e04040'],
+    gold: ['#806020', '#b08830', '#d4a840', '#f0c040', '#fff080'],
+    royal: ['#0a0a3a', '#1a1a5a', '#2a2a8a', '#3a50b0', '#5080d0'],
+  },
+  nature: {
+    forest: ['#0a1a0a', '#102a10', '#1a4a1a', '#2a7a2a', '#40b040'],
+    skin: ['#8a6040', '#b08060', '#d0a080', '#e8c0a0', '#f0d4b8'],
+  },
+  dark: ['#0a0a0e', '#14141e', '#1e1e2e', '#282838', '#323248'],
+};
+
+const P = CASTLE_PALETTE; // alias for legacy usage
 
 function shadeColor(hex: string, percent: number): string {
-  const num = parseInt(hex.replace('#', ''), 16);
-  const r = Math.max(0, Math.min(255, ((num >> 16) & 0xFF) + Math.round(255 * percent / 100)));
-  const g = Math.max(0, Math.min(255, ((num >> 8) & 0xFF) + Math.round(255 * percent / 100)));
-  const b = Math.max(0, Math.min(255, (num & 0xFF) + Math.round(255 * percent / 100)));
-  return `#${(r << 16 | g << 8 | b).toString(16).padStart(6, '0')}`;
+  const num = parseInt(hex.replace('#', ''), 16);
+  const r = Math.max(0, Math.min(255, ((num >> 16) & 0xFF) + Math.round(255 * percent / 100)));
+  const g = Math.max(0, Math.min(255, ((num >> 8) & 0xFF) + Math.round(255 * percent / 100)));
+  const b = Math.max(0, Math.min(255, (num & 0xFF) + Math.round(255 * percent / 100)));
+  return `#${((r << 16) | (g << 8) | b).toString(16).padStart(6, '0')}`;
 }
 
 // ─── Character palette builder ─────────────────────────────────────
-
-function charPalette(skin: string, hair: string, pri: string, sec: string, acc: string, cape?: string): Record<string, string> {
-  return {
-    O: '#1a1018',
-    S: skin, s: shadeColor(skin, -30),
-    H: hair, h: shadeColor(hair, -25),
-    P: pri, p: shadeColor(pri, -25),
-    C: sec, c: shadeColor(sec, -25),
-    A: acc, a: shadeColor(acc, -25),
-    K: cape ?? pri, k: shadeColor(cape ?? pri, -30),
-    W: '#ffffff', w: '#c8c8c8',
-    E: '#1a1020',
-    B: '#3e2a18', b: '#2e1a0a',
-    G: P.gold[3], g: P.gold[2],
-    M: '#7f8c8d', m: '#5a6570',
-    R: '#e74c3c', L: '#3498db', F: '#2ecc71',
-    T: '#f5e6ca', t: '#d4c5a9',
-  };
-}
+function charPalette(
+  skin: string,
+  hair: string,
+  pri: string,
+  sec: string,
+  acc: string,
+  cape?: string,
+): Record<string, string> {
+  return {
+    O: '#1a1018',
+    S: skin,
+    s: shadeColor(skin, -30),
+    H: hair,
+    h: shadeColor(hair, -25),
+    P: pri,
+    p: shadeColor(pri, -25),
+    C: sec,
+    c: shadeColor(sec, -25),
+    A: acc,
+    a: shadeColor(acc, -25),
+    K: cape ?? pri,
+    k: shadeColor(cape ?? pri, -30),
+    W: '#ffffff',
+    w: '#c8c8c8',
+    E: '#1a1020',
+    B: P.wood.shades[2],
+    b: P.wood.shades[1],
+    G: P.fabric.gold[3],
+    g: P.fabric.gold[2],
+    M: P.metal.base,
+    m: P.metal.shades[1],
+    R: P.fabric.crimson[3],
+    L: P.fabric.royal[3],
+    F: '#2ecc71',
+    T: P.nature.skin[3],
+    t: P.nature.skin[2],
+  };
 }
 
@@ -84,10 +111,10 @@ const PALETTE_MAP: Record<CharacterType, Record<string, string>> = {
-  king:       charPalette('#e8c0a0', '#8B6914', '#c0392b', '#f1c40f', '#f39c12', '#8B0000'),
-  knight:     charPalette('#e0b088', '#3a2510', '#7f8c8d', '#bdc3c7', '#2980b9'),
-  healer:     charPalette('#e8c0a0', '#f5e6ca', '#ecf0f1', '#3498db', '#2ecc71'),
-  sentinel:   charPalette('#d4a574', '#1a1a1a', '#2c3e50', '#34495e', '#e74c3c'),
-  nobility:   charPalette('#e8c0a0', '#4a3728', '#8e44ad', '#d4a8e0', '#f0c040'),
-  squire:     charPalette('#e8c0a0', '#c0763a', '#27ae60', '#8B7355', '#e0d6c2'),
-  scribe:     charPalette('#e8c0a0', '#6b4226', '#8B7355', '#d4c5a9', '#2c3e50'),
-  judge:      charPalette('#e8c0a0', '#888888', '#1a1a2e', '#e0d6c2', '#c0392b'),
-  blacksmith: charPalette('#c89060', '#1a1a1a', '#555555', '#f39c12', '#e74c3c'),
+  king: charPalette(P.nature.skin[3], '#8B6914', P.fabric.crimson[3], P.fabric.gold[3], '#f39c12', '#8B0000'),
+  knight: charPalette(P.nature.skin[2], '#3a2510', P.metal.base, '#bdc3c7', '#2980b9'),
+  healer: charPalette(P.nature.skin[3], P.nature.skin[4], '#ecf0f1', '#3498db', '#2ecc71'),
+  sentinel: charPalette(P.nature.skin[2], '#1a1a1a', '#2c3e50', '#34495e', P.fabric.crimson[3]),
+  nobility: charPalette(P.nature.skin[3], '#4a3728', '#8e44ad', '#d4a8e0', P.fabric.gold[3]),
+  squire: charPalette(P.nature.skin[3], '#c0763a', '#27ae60', '#8B7355', P.nature.skin[4]),
+  scribe: charPalette(P.nature.skin[3], '#6b4226', '#8B7355', P.nature.skin[3], '#2c3e50'),
+  judge: charPalette(P.nature.skin[3], '#888888', '#1a1a2e', P.nature.skin[4], P.fabric.crimson[3]),
+  blacksmith: charPalette('#c89060', '#1a1a1a', '#555555', '#f39c12', P.fabric.crimson[3]),
 };
 
-// ... rest of file unchanged
+// rest of file unchanged
+
